allow: Bash(DISCORD_TOKEN=fake.token.value CLIENT_ID=123 FLEET_PORT=8801 FLEET_SECRET=test timeout 6 node src/index.js)

Bash(node -e "try { const { DatabaseSync } = require\('node:sqlite'\); const db = new DatabaseSync\(':memory:'\); db.exec\('CREATE TABLE t\(x\)'\); db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES \(?\)'\).run\(42\); console.log\('node:sqlite OK ->', db.prepare\('SELECT x FROM t'\).get\(\)\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\('node:sqlite NOT available:', e.message\); }")
Bash(DISCORD_TOKEN=fake.token CLIENT_ID=123 FLEET_PORT=8803 FLEET_SECRET=test DASHBOARD_API_KEY=dk timeout 6 node src/index.js)
Bash(DISCORD_TOKEN=fake.token CLIENT_ID=123 FLEET_PORT=8805 FLEET_SECRET=test DASHBOARD_API_KEY=dk timeout 6 node src/index.js)

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; "stopped bot on 8787" } else { "nothing on 8787" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8787 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.Name; Path=$p.Path; Started=$p.StartTime } } | Format-List)
